reasoning: There is overwhelming evidence that Tua Tagovailoa is actively participating in the Miami Dolphins' 2025 training camp (which started on July 22, 2025) and has zero intention of retiring before the 2025 regular season. At this point, the likelihood of a surprise retirement before the regular season begins in early September is extremely low.
